signals.headline: Pectra (Prague-Electra) Upgrade in Final Testing | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Pectra (Prague-Electra) Upgrade in Final Testing | YES | HIGH confidence**
The Ethereum network's Pectra upgrade is entering its final testing phase, with promised improvements to wallet abstraction and validator efficiency[1]. This represents significant network development, though it hasn't been formally activated.

signals.headline: Spot Ethereum ETF Outflows Persist | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Spot Ethereum ETF Outflows Persist | YES | MED confidence**
Spot Ethereum ETFs lost over $77 million in assets in March, marking their fifth consecutive month of outflows[2]. This indicates ongoing institutional weakness rather than new bullish confirmation.
